svg.text: make bootstrap → fully running cluster with all components
13 repositories: Cilium, Cert-Manager, Istio, Envoy GW (OCI), Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, Kubescape, Falco, OpenTelemetry, Metrics Server, Trivy, OpenEBS
Fast-fail: abort before any cluster creation if any source is unreachable
kind create cluster — flux-kind · Kubernetes v1.36.1
1 control-plane + 2 workers · Pod CIDR: 10.244.0.0/16 · Service CIDR: 10.96.0.0/12 · API server: 127.0.0.1:6443
PHASE 2 · CNI BOOTSTRAP — Cilium (solves chicken-and-egg: Flux needs a CNI to schedule its own pods)
Pull v1.19.5 images from registry (including cilium-envoy, hubble-relay)
docker save | ctr import → all 3 KinD nodes in parallel
helm install cilium v1.19.5 (direct — bypasses Flux)
Hubble metrics: DNS, drop, TCP, flow, port-distribution, ICMP, HTTPv2
Pre-pull & load Istio proxy images into all KinD nodes
docker.io/istio/proxyv2:${ISTIO_VERSION} · docker save | ctr import → all 3 nodes in parallel · --platform linux/arm64
Prevents sidecar CrashLoopBackOff on first Flux reconcile · Bundled with Cilium image preload in Step 2 of the bootstrap script
brew install gh · Both steps are idempotent
gh auth login · Interactive: browser or token
Required so flux bootstrap can push manifests to the repo
path: clusters/kind · Flux v2.8.8 installed to flux-system namespace
sops-age ← ~/.config/sops/age/keys.txt (Age private key for SOPS decryption)
github-token ← GITHUB_TOKEN (Flux notification controller → commit status)
PHASE 6 · INFRASTRUCTURE RECONCILIATION — Flux Kustomization: infrastructure-controllers (wait: true)
PHASE 7 · APPS RECONCILIATION — Flux Kustomization: apps (dependsOn: infrastructure-controllers + infrastructure-configs · wait: true)
Flux alert notifications · Grafana datasources auto-configured
PHASE 8 · MONITORING RULES — Flux Kustomization: monitoring-rules (dependsOn: apps)
Alert rules + recording rules applied to Prometheus · Separated from the apps layer to avoid a Flux dry-run deadlock:
the PrometheusRule CRD is installed by kube-prometheus-stack in Phase 7 — it must exist before Flux validates these resources
✓ All Flux HelmReleases Ready=True ✓ Grafana /api/health OK ✓ Prometheus targets active ✓ Loki /ready OK ✓ Kyverno pods Running
